## AuthorizationRequest interface

Structured view of an incoming HTTP or WebSocket-upgrade request.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface AuthorizationRequest
```

## Remarks

Authorizers receive this object so they can inspect headers, query-string parameters, and request metadata without depending on raw `uWebSockets.js` objects.
